verse.name: v1
verse.lines: For 40 long years, God's people Journeyed in the wilderness Searchin for Canaan, That blessed promise land They never went too hungry Nor they never got too thirsty The more that God kept blessing them, The more they would complain

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Ain't God good to give us so many blessings? Undeserving, that's what we are We ought to thank Him, love and praise Him A little more today and a whole lot more tomorrow

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In the times that we live, so many are unthankful And many more, they fail to see that God has given all Never having time for God, they're always busy working To pay for cars, new homes, TV's, and carpet wall to wall.
